title: HIV.D Care-Treatment
description: This tab describes the data that may be collected during care and treatment clinical visit for HIV workflow (HIV.D)

resourceType.description: Resource type identifier for HIVDCareTreatment logical model

@context.description: JSON-LD context for this logical model with ValueSet vocabularies

anyOf.description: URI reference to external JSON-LD context

@type.description: JSON-LD type identifier for HIVDCareTreatment logical model

items.description: Coding-shaped {system, code} object from ValueSet HIV.D.DE1

reasonForVisit.description: Whether visit was scheduled or unscheduled, clinical only, or for ARV drug pick-up

scheduledVisit.description: Is this is a scheduled visit?

bodyTemperature.description: Temperature of the client in Celsius

respiratoryRate.description: The number of breaths per minute

heartRate.description: The number of heartbeats per minute

bodyWeight.description: The client's current weight in kilograms

bloodPressureCannotBeTaken.description: If the client's blood pressure cannot be taken, this should be indicated here. Otherwise, blood pressure should be measured.

items.description: Coding-shaped {system, code} object from ValueSet HIV.D.DE17

signsOfSeriousIllness.description: Signs that may indicate the client has a serious illness and needs triage or an emergency referral

otherSignOfSeriousIllnessSpecify.description: Client is exhibiting another sign of a serious illness (specify)

breastfeeding.description: Client is giving infant breast milk

numberOfPregnanciesGravida.description: Total number of times the woman has been pregnant (gravida)

numberOfMiscarriagesAndOrAbortions.description: Total number of pregnancies lost/ended due to miscarriages and/or abortions before 22 weeks/5 months

numberOfLiveBirths.description: Total number of live births after 22 weeks

parity.description: Calculated parity is the total number of live and stillbirths

serodiscordantPartner.description: Client's HIV status is different from a current partner's HIV status

artStartDate.description: The date on which the client started or restarted ART

dateArtStopped.description: Date on which client stopped ART

establishedOnArt.description: Is the client successfully established on ART?

artStartType.description: Whether the client is ART naive or is restarting ART

dateOfInitiationOnArt.description: The date on which the client was first initiated on ART

timeOnArt.description: Time the client has been on ART since starting or restarting it in years and months

datesArtRestarted.description: Date(s) client restarted ART after stopping (intentionally interrupting) for any number of reasons (see 'Reason ART stopped')

artCohort.description: Month and year client originally started ART (documented) at a health facility in the system. The cohort is a group of patients who started ART in the same month (or quarter) and year, whose status is followed over time, using the ART register.

transferInForHivCare.description: Client is transferring in with records or known ART drugs and ART start date

dateOfTransferIn.description: Date client presented at facility (with transfer/referral slip) from another facility (and on ART) within the system

facilityTransferredFrom.description: Name of health facility client was transferred from

dateEnrolledInHivCare.description: Date client first enrols in HIV care at the facility. Begins when a person with a confirmed HIV diagnosis presents to a facility where HIV care is provided and a medical record, patient card, file or chart is opened for the first time. This could be at an HIV care/ART, MNCH or TB clinic.

ageAtEnrolment.description: Client's age when the client was enrolled in ART care

facilityWhereClientFirstEnrolledInHivCar.description: Facility where the client first enrolled in HIV care

antiretroviralArvDrugsReceivedPriorToEnr.description: Whether or not the client received ARV drugs prior to enrolling into HIV care

dateArvDrugsReceivedPriorToEnrolment.description: Date ARV drugs were started prior to enrolment into HIV care/ART

locationArvDrugsReceivedPriorToEnrolment.description: Health facility (or other location) where ARV drugs were received prior to enrolment into HIV care/ART

arvDrugRegimenReceivedPriorToEnrolment.description: ARV drug regimen received prior to enrolment into HIV care/ART

items.description: Coding-shaped {system, code} object from ValueSet HIV.D.DE65

existingChronicHealthConditions.description: Does the client have any current chronic health conditions or problems?

otherExistingChronicHealthConditions.description: Other health conditions not included in the list (specify)

originalFirstLineArtRegimen.description: Original full, first-line ARV drug regimen patient started on at this facility

currentArtRegimen.description: The current ART regimen the client is taking

currentArtRegimenStartDate.description: The date on which the client started taking the current ART regimen

items.description: Coding-shaped {system, code} object from ValueSet HIV.D.DE77

preferredFirstLineArtRegimen.description: The preferred first-line ART regimen for the client according to WHO (or national) guidelines

alternativeFirstLineArtRegimen.description: The alternative first-line ART regimen for the client according to WHO (or national) guidelines

preferredSecondLineArtRegimen.description: The preferred second-line ART regimen for the client according to WHO (or national) guidelines

items.description: Coding-shaped {system, code} object from ValueSet HIV.D.DE81

alternativeSecondLineArtRegimen.description: The alternative second-line ART regimen for the client according to WHO (or national) guidelines

items.description: Coding-shaped {system, code} object from ValueSet HIV.D.DE82

optimalRegimenForTransition.description: The optimal regimen for transition to DTG-based regimens for children established on ART

currentArtRegimenFirstSecondOrThirdLine.description: ART regimen for treating clients living with HIV, based on national guidance

otherArtRegimen.description: Other regimen based upon WHO recommendations (specify)

items.description: Coding-shaped {system, code} object from ValueSet HIV.D.DE128

artRegimenComposition.description: Drug composition of client's current ART regimen

items.description: Coding-shaped {system, code} object from ValueSet HIV.D.DE146

items.description: Coding-shaped {system, code} object from ValueSet HIV.D.DE152

preventionServicesOfferedAndReferrals.description: Offer or refer for prevention services

items.description: Coding-shaped {system, code} object from ValueSet HIV.D.DE156

sexualAndReproductiveHealthIntegratedSer.description: Offer or refer to sexual and reproductive health services

hbsagTestDate.description: Date client was tested for hepatitis B virus (HBV)

dateHbvTestResultReturnedToClient.description: Date HBV test result (HBsAG) was returned to client

hbvTreatmentTdfStartDate.description: Date when client started treatment (TDF) for hepatitis B virus (HBV)

hbvTreatmentRegimenPrescribed.description: Hepatitis B virus treatment regimen prescribed

hcvTestDate.description: Date client was tested for hepatitis C virus (HCV antibody, HCV RNA or HCV core antigen)

hcvTestResult.description: Hepatitis C virus test result (HCV antibody, HCV RNA or HCV core antigen)

dateHcvTestResultReturnedToClient.description: Date HCV test result was returned to client

hcvTreatmentStartDate.description: Date when client started treatment for hepatitis C virus (HCV)

hcvTreatmentCompletionDate.description: Date when client completed treatment for hepatitis C virus (HCV)

hcvTreatmentRegimenPrescribed.description: Hepatitis C virus treatment regimen prescribed

hcvViralLoadTestDate.description: Hepatitis C viral load test date

hcvViralLoadTestResult.description: Hepatitis C viral load test result (qualitative)

hcvMedicineType.description: Type of medicine client is prescribed

currentlyOnTdfBasedArt.description: Client is currently on TDF-based ART regimen

hivClinicalStage.description: WHO clinical stage of client based on signs and symptoms. WHO clinical staging is a way to categorize HIV disease severity based on new or recurrent clinical events. There are 4 WHO clinical stages that range from mild symptoms (WHO clinical stage 1) to severe symptoms (WHO clinical stage 4).

numberOfMissedDoses.description: Number of doses of antiretroviral therapy (ART) the client missed since the last visit, used for monitoring adherence

receivedViralLoadTestResult.description: Client received results from viral load test

dateViralLoadTestResultsReceivedByClient.description: The date on which the client received results from viral load test

dateOfViralLoadSampleCollection.description: Date and time when the sample was collected to test the client's HIV viral load

dateOfScheduledReviewOfViralLoadTestResu.description: Expected date when client's viral load test results will be returned and reviewed

dateOfArtInterruption.description: Date of client's ART interruption (ART stop or missed drug pick-up)

items.description: Coding-shaped {system, code} object from ValueSet HIV.D.DE197

reasonsForAdherenceProblem.description: Reason why client was not adherent

otherReasonForNonadherenceSpecify.description: Client reported not being adherent because of other reason for nonadherence (specify)

items.description: Coding-shaped {system, code} object from ValueSet HIV.D.DE217

otherReasonForStoppingArtSpecify.description: Client stopped ART because of other reason (specify)

items.description: Coding-shaped {system, code} object from ValueSet HIV.D.DE225
Coding-shaped {system, code} object from ValueSet HIV.D.DE229

generalCareActivitiesRecommended.description: General care activities to be performed during the care visit

items.description: Coding-shaped {system, code} object from ValueSet HIV.D.DE247

preventingAndTreatingCoinfections.description: Coinfection prevention and treatment activities performed during the care visit

items.description: Coding-shaped {system, code} object from ValueSet HIV.D.DE259

riskFactorsComorbiditiesAndCoinfectionsS.description: Signs and symptoms of opportunistic infections or other comorbidities experienced by client

otherRiskFactorsComorbiditiesAndCoinfect.description: Other comorbidities or coinfection signs or symptoms (specify)

items.description: Coding-shaped {system, code} object from ValueSet HIV.D.DE289

whoHivClinicalStageConditionOrSymptom.description: New or recurrent clinical events used to categorize HIV disease severity based at baseline and follow up

clinicalStageAtStartOfArt.description: WHO clinical stage of client based on signs and symptoms at start of ART

dateOfClinicalStatusChange.description: Date on which the client's WHO HIV clinical stage changed, including the date when the client's stage is first determined

dateOfCd4CountTest.description: Date and time when CD4 count test was conducted

baselineCd4Count.description: CD4 count performed at HIV diagnosis

dateOfBaselineCd4CountTest.description: Date and time when baseline CD4 count test was conducted

lateArtInitiation.description: Client had late ART initiation. That is, the client's first CD4 count from baseline CD4 test performed (such as at HIV diagnosis) was a count of less than 200 cells/mm3

items.description: Coding-shaped {system, code} object from ValueSet HIV.D.DE370

reasonsForDelayedArtInitiation.description: Reason why ART was not initiated at diagnosis or within 7 days of diagnosis

otherReasonsForDelayedArtInitiation.description: Client did not initiate ART at diagnosis or within 7 days of diagnosis because of other reason (specify)

artInitiatedWithin7DaysOfDiagnosis.description: Client initiated ART within 7 days of diagnosis

timeToStartArt.description: Time from HIV diagnosis to when client started ART

viralLoadTestResult.description: Result from the viral load test in number of copies/mL

virallySuppressed.description: The client is virally suppressed for HIV, based on the client's most recent viral load test result being less than 1000 copies/mL

dateViralLoadTestResultsReceived.description: Date the viral load test result was received from the lab or completed in the facility

viralLoadSuppressionDate.description: Date on which the client tested as becoming virally suppressed, as indicated by a viral load test result under 1000 copies/mL

reasonForHivViralLoadTest.description: Whether the viral load is being tested for routine monitoring on a set schedule or for targeted monitoring for suspected treatment failure

hepatitisCTestRecommended.description: Hepatitis C test is recommended or should be considered

items.description: Coding-shaped {system, code} object from ValueSet HIV.D.DE399

monitoringExaminations.description: Name of examinations, test and results for any relevant investigations carried out for client

hepatitisCTestOrdered.description: Hepatitis C test has been ordered

receivedViralLoadTestResults.description: Client received results from viral load test

dateViralLoadTestResultsReceivedByClient.description: The date on which the client received results from a viral load test

switchToSecondLineArtRegimenRecommended.description: A switch to second-line ART regimen is recommended

regimenSwitchMade.description: Provider has made a regimen switch

otherReasonForRegimenSwitch.description: A switch was made to the regimen for another reason (specify)

regimenStartDate.description: The date on which the client started taking the current ART regimen

items.description: Coding-shaped {system, code} object from ValueSet HIV.D.DE457

medicationsPrescribed.description: Name or regimen code of all other medications prescribed during the visit

doseOfMedicationsPrescribed.description: Number of doses (quantity taken at a single point in time) of drugs prescribed/dispensed

numberOfDaysMedicationsPrescribed.description: Number of days supply of each medication or regimen prescribed during the visit

items.description: Coding-shaped {system, code} object from ValueSet HIV.D.DE461

frequency.description: Prescribed frequency for taking the medication

adherenceCounsellingProvided.description: Counselling was carried out during visit

items.description: Coding-shaped {system, code} object from ValueSet HIV.D.DE466

typeOfTreatmentLimitingToxicity.description: Type of treatment-limiting toxicity experienced by client. Treatment-limiting toxicity is defined as a serious adverse drug reaction that results in drug discontinuation or substitution. In addition, any reaction that leads to treatment interruption or requires changing the drug or regimen because of an adverse drug reaction is also considered a serious adverse drug reaction.

unexpectedAdverseDrugReactionSpecify.description: Specify the type of unexpected adverse drug reaction the client experienced

datesOfSubstitutionWithinFirstLineRegime.description: Date on which ARV drug regimen (one or more drugs) for client was changed within the first-line regimen (substitution)

items.description: Coding-shaped {system, code} object from ValueSet HIV.D.DE482

reasonsForSubstitutionWithinFirstLineReg.description: Reason(s) why one ore more drugs in client's first-line ARV drug regimen was changed (substituted)

newAntiretroviralRegimenAfterSubstitutio.description: New antiretroviral (ARV) drugs after client changed regimen within the first-line regimen

dateOfSwitchToSecondLineRegimen.description: Date client was changed from a first-line to second-line ARV drug regimen (switch)

newRegimenAfterSwitchToSecondLineRegimen.description: New ART regimen after switch to second-line ART regimen

newRegimenAfterSwitchToThirdLineRegimen.description: New ART regimen after switch to third-line ART regimen

addressOfTreatmentSupporter.description: Full address or description of home of treatment supporter

telephoneNumberOfTreatmentSupporter.description: Telephone number if available, or else telephone number of neighbour/friend
